entries.rationale: Non-idempotent confirmation comment creation is reconciled after an ambiguous outcome and is never blindly retried.
Content-addressed blob creation is reconciled by deterministic Git object identity after an ambiguous outcome.
Evidence tree creation is a single-attempt mutation.
Evidence commit creation is a single-attempt mutation.
The evidence ref is advanced once with force disabled after exact ref rechecks.
Immutable tag creation is a single-attempt mutation after exact authorization and current-head checks.
Lifecycle label addition is an explicit mutation followed by read-back verification.
Lifecycle label removal is an explicit mutation followed by read-back verification.
Ruleset bypass actor counts are unavailable in the required REST shape; the response is validated offline and has no mutation fields.
Idempotent lifecycle label creation uses the dedicated gh command.
No-clobber asset upload uses the dedicated release command after checksum/name reconciliation.
Existing remote assets are downloaded only after exact release inventory validation and are compared byte-for-byte with promoted assets.
The dedicated release downloader fetches an already validated exact ten-asset inventory into a private staging directory for offline checks.
Stable GitHub Release creation uses the dedicated command after exact tag and absence checks.
Cryptographic attestation verification is delegated to the dedicated gh verifier and its JSON is sealed into evidence.

Registered cross-workflow aggregation authority: the complete exact required-check set and state gate the merge before and after confirmation, while typed attempt-qualified identity additionally binds the exact quality-gate run and job.
Optional repository-name discovery is used only when GITHUB_REPOSITORY is absent and is strictly validated.
Squash merge is an exact-head mutation with ambiguous-outcome reconciliation.
A full-run rerun is issued only from a signed-off offline classification; failed-jobs-only reruns are prohibited.
Required-check discovery supplies the quality-gate URL; typed identity binds the exact run attempt and job before evidence assembly.
Attempt-qualified timing/job data is diagnostic metrics input after the authoritative run tuples have been typed and verified.
Deterministic tap PR discovery is followed by exact branch/head/body/file verification.
Tap PR files and body are read through the dedicated command and compared to the deterministic formula contract.
The scoped App token is installed into Git credential transport for the isolated tap worktree.
Tap PR creation uses a deterministic branch and exact body after remote no-clobber checks.
The tap PR head and mergeability are re-read and strictly compared before merge.
Tap merge is exact-head matched and reconciled by read-only state after ambiguity.
Provenance and SBOM verification use the dedicated cryptographic verifier with exact repository/workflow/source constraints.
